## What this changes

A short description of the change and the motivation behind it.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If I changed the bridge script, I bumped `BRIDGE_VERSION` and
      `EXPECTED_BRIDGE_VERSION` together
- [ ] I added or updated unit tests for any pure logic
- [ ] Commit messages contain no em-dashes (the `commit-msg` hook enforces this)

## Testing

How you verified this, including anything checked against a live After Effects.
